name: python-library-course-builder
description: Build source-backed hands-on learning repositories for Python libraries in Simplified Chinese or English.

interface.shortDescription: Build or regenerate Python courses in Chinese or English
interface.longDescription: Turn a Python library into a cumulative course in Simplified Chinese or English, or fully regenerate an existing course when authoring capability changes.
defaultPrompt: Use $building-python-library-courses to create or fully regenerate a source-backed course for a Python library or repository.
